# Baerly Storage

Vendorless, causally consistent multiplayer document database that runs
entirely client-side over any S3-compatible storage (S3, R2, Backblaze,
Minio). No server. The client polls a time-ordered manifest log to sync
state across writers.

## Toolchain

pnpm · vitest · TypeScript 7 (tsgo) · oxfmt · oxlint · rolldown

## Verification

Run `pnpm verify` (typecheck + lint). It is the only check guaranteed
green on `main` — see CLAUDE.md for the full verification ritual and
known-baseline test failures.

## Where to start

- [CLAUDE.md](./CLAUDE.md) — agent guidance, module map, conventions
- [docs/features.md](./docs/features.md) — feature → code map
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](./docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) — lifecycle and module graph
- [docs/sync_protocol.md](./docs/sync_protocol.md) — protocol theory
- [docs/adr/](./docs/adr/) — architecture decisions
- [docs/troubleshooting.md](./docs/troubleshooting.md) — known issues
- [docs/conventions/](./docs/conventions/) — path-scoped conventions for src/, tests/, docs/

The public API entry point is `src/mps3.ts` (the `MPS3` class). Every
public method has JSDoc with `@example`. Read those before any markdown
reference.
